title: China-to-Fiji Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Fiji PV Inverter Projects
rows.target_requirement: Fiji's standards administration is handled through the Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS), while project owners and EFL commonly rely on IEC-aligned technical evidence for grid-connected electrical equipment. For PV inverters, the relevant EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emissions / immunity evidence, including harmonic current emissions where relevant. The EMC file should cover the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and installation environment being supplied to Fiji, including tropical humidity, coastal salt-mist exposure, surge exposure, and heat derating assumptions for island grids.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and related test methods
Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS) standards administration
Energy Fiji Limited project and grid-connection technical review
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test methods at CNAS-accredited laboratories. Although Chinese standards may reference IEC 61000-family methods, GB/T 37408 EMC files are not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 project package for Fiji. They also may not document operation under Fiji's 240/415 V grid, coastal surge exposure, salt-mist environment, or project-specific cable and earthing configuration.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports for China market PV inverters
rows.gap: Gap: China domestic EMC evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for Fiji project review. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, EFL engineer, lender, or EPC requires ILAC-accredited IEC reports, and whether harmonics or immunity results need to be rechecked at 240/415 V, 50 Hz. For coastal and cyclone-exposed projects, EMC and surge-protection documentation should be paired with installation evidence for earthing, lightning protection, enclosure integrity, and salt-mist corrosion resistance.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required in practice for EFL, EPC, lender, or owner technical review of grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence supports China domestic voluntary certification and procurement but does not automatically transfer to Fiji IEC-aligned project review

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T 37408 EMC reports as supporting evidence, not as a complete Fiji EMC file. Confirm IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series report expectations with the Fiji buyer, EFL reviewer, EPC, or lender, and check whether the 240/415 V grid profile, coastal surge exposure, and salt-mist environment require additional project evidence.

source.publisher: Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS), Fiji

rows.requirement: EFL Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 240/415 V 50 Hz Settings
rows.target_requirement: Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) is the national utility and practical grid-connection reviewer for grid-connected solar PV installations on its network. Fiji follows a 50 Hz electricity system with common low-voltage service at approximately 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase. For grid-tied PV inverters, project submissions should be prepared around IEC-aligned evidence, especially IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface performance, with inverter firmware, voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning settings validated for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz network. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
target_standards: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Energy Fiji Limited grid-connection and project technical review requirements
Fiji low-voltage grid basis — 240/415 V, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid conditions and domestic grid-operator acceptance. They are not automatically accepted by EFL or Fiji project owners as IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, and they do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Fiji's 240/415 V network.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for Fiji project-level EFL acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the specific inverter model, document the Fiji grid-code or project settings loaded into firmware, and validate protection thresholds at 240/415 V, 50 Hz. Because Fiji is a cyclone-prone Pacific island market, commissioning files should also document enclosure rating, corrosion protection, surge protection, mounting, and thermal derating assumptions for coastal and high-humidity sites.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects requiring EFL connection review and commissioning acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence supports China domestic grid acceptance but is not transferable to EFL Fiji project acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit China-only GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 files as a complete Fiji grid-connection package. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and confirm EFL project settings for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid. Fiji shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs, so firmware and protection settings should be checked before commissioning.

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — DNTMS, FCCC, and Fiji Project Review
rows.target_requirement: Fiji standards administration is handled through DNTMS, while the Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission (FCCC) is relevant to consumer and market conduct oversight. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, the practical safety baseline expected by utilities, EPCs, lenders, and project owners is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the inverter model or model family. Fiji's tropical maritime environment also makes the safety file more than an electrical shock file: it should document IP rating, humidity and temperature operating limits, corrosion controls, terminal and enclosure materials, surge protection coordination, and installation constraints for cyclone-prone and salt-mist coastal locations.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS) standards administration
Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission (FCCC) consumer and market oversight context
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These files may demonstrate China-market conformity but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates requested in Fiji project procurement or EFL grid-connection review. China documentation also often assumes domestic environmental and installation conditions, and may not cover Fiji-specific cyclone, high-humidity, salt-mist, and elevated ambient-temperature derating risks.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary China-market PV inverter certification schemes
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the specific inverter model or family supplied to Fiji. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, EFL, EPC, or lender requires ILAC-accredited reports, and should add environmental design evidence for coastal corrosion, humidity, enclosure sealing, surge withstand, ventilation, and cyclone-resistant installation. Where an inverter model is reconfigured from a China-market firmware profile to Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz profile, the safety and operating-limit documentation should identify that configuration.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for utility, EPC, lender, insurer, or owner acceptance of Fiji grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary China-market PV inverter certification evidence does not automatically transfer to Fiji IEC 62109 project acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or domestic voluntary certification alone for Fiji PV inverter safety review. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the supplied model and document Fiji-specific environmental controls for cyclone exposure, humidity, salt mist, surge protection, and thermal derating before shipment or project submission.
